translations.![首先是哈里 iPhone 上的使用紀錄。](/assets/9a05f632: ![First is Harry's usage record on the iPhone.](/assets/9a05f632eba0/1*f0F0ypi2F-6_yOTsBmynhg.png)
translations.### iOS 基於保護個人隱私的歷年功能調整\n\n: ### iOS Privacy Protection Feature Updates Over the Years
translations.### iOS 隱私與便利的前世今生\n\n: ### The Past and Present of iOS Privacy and Convenience
translations.#### **App privacy details on the App St: #### **App privacy details on the App Store:**
translations.#### **App 與 App 之間互通有無的第二種方法是 URL Schem: #### **The second method for communication between apps is URL Scheme:**
translations.#### **App 與 網站或 App 之間的廣告成效統計：**\n\n: #### **Ad Performance Measurement Between Apps and Websites or Apps:**
translations.#### **最後一種也是唯一還能的方法 — Pasteboard** ：\n\: #### **The last and only remaining method — Pasteboard**:
translations.#### **第一種方式是早期可以直接存取 Device UUID：**\n\n: #### **The first method was early access to the Device UUID:**
translations.#### **第一種方法也是透過 Cookie 來串接：**\n\n: #### **The first method also connects through Cookies:**
translations.#### **第一種方法可以用 Third-Party Cookie 跨網站串起: #### **The first method uses Third-Party Cookies to link visitor data across websites:**
translations.#### **第二種方法是同網站與網站用IP Address + 裝置資訊算出的: #### **The second method is to identify the same visitor across different websites using a fingerprint calculated from the IP Address + device information within the same site:**
translations.#### **第二種方法是用 IP Address + 裝置資訊算出的 Fing: #### **The second method is using a fingerprint calculated from the IP Address + device information to identify the same visitor across different websites:**
translations.***iOS &gt;= 15 iCloud+ 用戶支援 Hide My Ema: ***iOS >= 15 iCloud+ users support Hide My Email***
translations.***iOS ≥ 13 所有支援第三方登入的 App 都需要多實作 Sign i: ***All apps supporting third-party login on iOS ≥ 13 must implement Sign in with Apple, or they cannot be successfully published on the App Store***
translations.***iOS ≥ 15 新增限制，最多只能設定 50 組其他 App 的 Sch: ***iOS ≥ 15 added a limit: you can set up to 50 schemes for other apps at most.***
translations.***事實證明，技術上是可行的；那究竟躲在所有網站、App 之後的第三方是誰呢？: ***Technically, it is feasible; but who exactly are the third parties hiding behind all websites and apps?***
translations.***另外我也多抓到幾個中國 App 也會偷做事，直接在設定全部禁用它們的權限了: ***Additionally, I found several Chinese apps misbehaving, so I disabled all their permissions in the settings.***
translations.***在現實世界活出精彩人生！***\n\n: ***Live a Wonderful Life in the Real World!***
translations.***已沒有人有機會拼湊出哈里的活動輪廓。***\n\n: ***No one has a chance to piece together Harry's activity profile anymore.***
translations.***要不是有這個功能讓他們見光死，還不知道我們的資料會被竊取多久！***\n\: ***If it weren't for this feature exposing them, we wouldn't know how long our data had been stolen!***
translations.***這邊要多提一下關於 iOS 14 剪貼簿的隱私恐慌，詳細可參考我之前的文章: ***Here, I want to highlight the iOS 14 clipboard privacy panic. For more details, please refer to my previous article “[iOS 14 Clipboard Privacy Panic: The Dilemma Between Privacy and Convenience](../8a04443024e2/)”***
translations.***🈲，iOS &gt;= 11 禁止 Safari 和 App WebVie: ***🈲, iOS >= 11 prohibits sharing cookies between Safari and App WebView***
translations.***🈲，iOS &gt;= 14.5 IDentifierForAdverti: ***🈲，iOS >= 14.5 IDentifierForAdvertisers requires user permission before use***
translations.***🈲，iOS &gt;= 7 禁止存取 Device UUID,***\n\: ***🈲, iOS >= 7 prohibits access to Device UUID,***
translations.***🈲，iOS &gt;= 9 需先在 App 內設定才能使用；不能任意探測。: ***🈲，iOS >= 9 requires in-app settings before use; arbitrary probing is not allowed.***
translations.***🈲，在 iOS &gt;= 11 後的 Safari 都實裝了 Intel: ***🈲, Safari on iOS >= 11 has implemented Intelligent Tracking Prevention ([WebKit](https://webkit.org/blog/7675/intelligent-tracking-prevention/){:target="_blank"})***
translations.**IDFA：** 不同開發者、不同 App 之間能拿到相同的 UUID，但是: **IDFA:** Different developers and apps can access the same UUID, but users can reset or disable the IDFA.
translations.**IDFV：** 同個開發者帳號下的所有 App 能拿到同一個 UUID； [: **IDFV:** All apps under the same developer account can access the same UUID; [combined with KeyChain, it is currently the method to identify user UUID](../a4bc3bce7513/).
translations.**IP 會保證在同個國家和時區** （使用者可選模糊城市）、無法指定 IP\n: **IP will be guaranteed within the same country and time zone** (users can choose to blur the city), but cannot specify the exact IP
translations.**iOS ≥ 13：** 所有支援第三方登入的 App 都需要多實作 Sign: **iOS ≥ 13:** All apps supporting third-party login must implement Sign in with Apple, or they cannot be successfully published on the App Store.
translations.**iOS ≥ 14.5：** IDFA 必須允許後才能存取，幾乎等同封殺 ID: **iOS ≥ 14.5:** Access to IDFA requires user permission, effectively blocking IDFA usage.
translations.**iOS ≥ 15** ：Private Relay，使用 Proxy 隱藏使: **iOS ≥ 15**: Private Relay uses a proxy to hide the user's original IP address
translations.**只對部分流量有效**\niCloud+ 用戶：所有 Safari 上的流量:
**Effective Only for Some Traffic**  
iCloud+ users: All traffic on Safari + Insecure HTTP Requests within apps  
Regular users: Only effective for third-party trackers installed on websites in Safari
translations.**右邊是已安裝的 App：** 有投資、旅遊、社交、購物、還有嬰兒攝影機…這些: **On the right are the installed apps:** Investment, travel, social, shopping, and even a baby monitor… these apps
translations.**如果你覺得以上已經夠可怕了，還有更可怕的：**\n\n: **If you think the above is already scary enough, there is something even scarier:**
translations.**官方有提供 [CDN Egress IP List](https://mas: **The official [CDN Egress IP List](https://mask-api.icloud.com/egress-ip-ranges.csv){:target="_blank"} is provided for website developers to identify (do not mistakenly block Egress IPs, as it may cause widespread issues).**
translations.**左邊是網頁瀏覽紀錄：** 可以看到分別造訪了跟車子、iPhone 13、精品: **On the left is the web browsing history:** You can see visits to websites related to cars, iPhone 13, and luxury goods.
translations.**我們假設哈里所有的活動，背後都偷藏著同一個第三方在默默收集他的資料，那麼在它: **Let's assume that behind all of Harry's activities, the same third party is quietly collecting his data. From their perspective, Harry's possible profile might look like this:**
translations.**相信這幾年開發者或是 iPhone 用戶應該都對以下功能調整並不陌生：**\: **Developers and iPhone users alike have likely become familiar with the following feature changes over the past few years:**
translations.**答案是：就技術手段是有的，而且「可能」或是「已經」局部發生。**\n\n: **The answer is: There are technical means, and it is "possible" or has "already" partially occurred.**
translations.**雖然不能排除讀取剪貼簿是想竊資，但更多時候是我們 App 需要提供更好的使用: **Although reading the clipboard could be for data theft, more often it is because our app needs to provide a better user experience:**
translations.*`Apps linked on or after iOS 15 are lim: *`Apps linked on or after iOS 15 are limited to a maximum of 50 entries in the LSApplicationQueriesSchemes key.`*
translations.*iOS ≥ 14 開始，位置及相片存取可以更細微的控制，可以只授權取用某幾張相: *iOS ≥ 14 introduced finer control over location and photo access, allowing users to grant permission for specific photos only or to allow location access only while the app is in use.*
translations.*iOS ≥ 15，可以匯出近 7 天手機所有 App 的隱私相關功能取用、網路: *iOS ≥ 15 allows exporting a report of all apps' privacy-related feature usage and network activity records from the past 7 days.*
translations.*iOS ≥ 15，增加 [CLLocationButton](https://: *iOS ≥ 15 adds the [CLLocationButton](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/corelocationui/cllocationbutton){:target="_blank"} to improve user experience. It allows obtaining the current location through user tap without prior consent or prompt. This button cannot be customized and can only be triggered by user interaction.*
translations.*iOS ≥ 15，增加個人隱私功能的取用提示，如：剪貼簿、位置、相機、麥克風*: *iOS ≥ 15, added access prompts for personal privacy features, such as clipboard, location, camera, and microphone*
translations.*一般情況下如果是為了要做到 Deferred Deep Link 僅會在第一次: *Generally, to implement Deferred Deep Link, the clipboard information is only read the first time the app is opened or when returning to the app, not during use or at unusual times. This is an important point to note.*
translations.*可以多提一下，蘋果並非閉門造車； [SKAdNetwork](https://: *It can be added that Apple is not working in isolation; [SKAdNetwork](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/storekit/skadnetwork){:target="_blank"} is now at version 2.0, and Apple continues to gather developers' and advertisers' feedback to balance personal privacy controls while continuously improving the SDK features.*
translations.*我相信人是聰明的，有些人會比其他人更想分享數據，每次都去問他們，讓他們煩到叫你: *I believe people are smart; some are more willing to share data than others. Always ask them each time until they get annoyed and tell you to stop asking, so they clearly understand how you intend to use their data. —* translate by [Chun-Hsiu Liu](https://medium.com/u/72361fccaa43){:target="_blank"}
translations.*蘋果相信隱私是基本人權*\n\n: *Apple believes privacy is a fundamental human right*
translations.*這邊真心許願 Deferred Deep Link 能用 SDK 串起，因為我: *Here, I sincerely hope Deferred Deep Link can be integrated via SDK, as our goal is to enhance user experience without intending to invade personal privacy.*
translations.- **IDFV:** All apps under the same deve:
- **IDFV:** All apps within the same developer account can access the same UUID; [combined with KeyChain, it is currently the method to identify user UUID](../a4bc3bce7513/).

- **IDFA:** Different developers and apps can access the same UUID, but users can reset or disable the IDFA.
translations.- **Respecting Personal Privacy**\n\n- *:
- **Respecting Personal Privacy**

- **Not Controlled by Capital**

- **Reducing Virtual Addiction**

- **Preventing Social Decline**
translations.- **iOS ≥ 13:** All apps supporting thir:
- **iOS ≥ 13:** All apps supporting third-party login must implement Sign in with Apple, or they cannot be successfully published on the App Store.

- **iOS ≥ 14:** Clipboard Access Warning

- **iOS ≥ 14.5:** Access to IDFA requires user permission, effectively blocking IDFA usage.

- **iOS ≥ 15:** Private Relay uses a proxy to hide the user's original IP address

- **iOS ≥ 16:** Clipboard access requires user permission

- ...and many more, which will be shared with everyone at the end of the article
translations.- Apple/CDN providers do not have comple:
- Apple/CDN providers do not have complete logs for tracing:  
  I checked how Apple prevents misuse in malicious scenarios but found no clear answer; it might be similar to how Apple refuses to unlock criminals' iPhones for the FBI. Privacy is a fundamental human right for everyone.

- Enabled by default, no special connection needed

- No impact on speed or performance

- **IP will be guaranteed within the same country and time zone** (users can choose to blur the city), but cannot specify the exact IP

- **Effective Only for Some Traffic**  
  iCloud+ users: All traffic on Safari + Insecure HTTP Requests within apps  
  Regular users: Only effective for third-party trackers installed on websites in Safari

- **The official [CDN Egress IP List](https://mask-api.icloud.com/egress-ip-ranges.csv){:target="_blank"} is provided for website developers to identify (do not mistakenly block Egress IPs, as it may cause widespread issues).**

- [Network administrators can ban DNS to disable Private Relay for all users](https://developer.apple.com/support/prepare-your-network-for-icloud-private-relay/){:target="_blank"}

- iPhone Can Disable Private Relay for Specific Network Connections

- Connecting to VPN/Proxy will disable Private Relay

- Currently still in Beta (2021/10/24). After activation, some services may not connect (China region, Chinese version of TikTok) or services may frequently log out.
translations.- Data Minimization: Apple uses technica:
- Data Minimization: Apple employs technical methods to restrict access to only the necessary data.

- On-Device Processing: Private data is not uploaded to the cloud; all processing happens locally. Examples include Safari Private Click Measurement, Apple's [machine learning SDK CoreML](../793bf2cdda0f/) running locally, Siri/Live Text in Camera on iOS ≥ 15, Apple Maps, News, photo recognition features, and more.

- User Transparency and Control: New Privacy Access Prompts, Activity Reports, and Granular Privacy Controls.

- Security: Secure data storage and transmission, preventing misuse of UserDefault. iOS 15 supports point-to-point encryption and decryption with CryptoKit, and transmission security with Private Relay.
translations.- Data Minimization: Only Collect the Da:
- Data Minimization: Only collect the data you need.

- On-Device Processing: Apple leverages powerful processor chips to ensure that personal privacy-related data is processed locally whenever possible.

- User Transparency and Control: Inform users about what privacy data is collected and how it is used. Also, allow users to control sharing settings for each privacy item.

- Security: Ensure the safety of data storage and transmission.
translations.- Developers' own API calls for sending:
- Developers' own API calls for sending tracking data must also comply with the tracking domain regulations mentioned above.

- If the Tracking Domain is the same as the API Domain, a separate independent Tracking Domain is required (e.g. api.zhgchg.li -> tracking.zhgchg.li)

- Currently, it is not possible to know how Apple controls developers' own tracking. Testing with XCode 15 on our own app did not detect any tracking.

- It is unclear whether the official process uses tools to detect behavior or if reviewers manually inspect it.
translations.- Example: `https://zhgchg.li/post/1?gcl:
- Example: `https://zhgchg.li/post/1?gclid=124` will become `https://zhgchg.li/post/1` after clicking.

- Currently testing iOS 17 Developer Beta 4, `fbxxx`, `gcxxx`, etc. are removed, while `utm_` parameters remain; it is unclear if the official iOS 17 or future iOS 18 will enhance this further.

- To see the effect under the strictest conditions, you can install the [iOS DuckDuckGo](https://apps.apple.com/tw/app/duckduckgo-private-browser/id663592361){:target="_blank"} browser for testing.

- For detailed testing information, please refer to the excellent article "[iOS17 Safari's New Feature Removes fbclid and gclid from URLs](https://blog.user.today/ios17-safari-remove-fbclid-and-gclid/){:target="_blank"}".
translations.- Figure 1 Disabled: Original IP Address:
- Figure 1 Disabled: Original IP Address

- Figure 2 Enable Private Relay — Maintain General Location: IP becomes CDN IP but still in Taipei

- Figure 3 Enabling Private Relay — Usage by Country and Time Zone (Expanded Obfuscation): IP changes to CDN IP & location changes to Taichung, but remains in the same time zone and country
translations.- Legal Regulations (e.g., SGS-BS10012 P:
- Legal Regulations (e.g., SGS-BS10012 Personal Data Verification, CCPA, GDPR…)

- Privacy Policy and De-identification
translations.- Name can be edited freely\n\n- Can hid:
- Name can be edited freely

- Can hide real Email (use Apple-generated virtual Email as a substitute)

- Users can request account deletion [**Apps must implement by 2022/01/31**](https://developer.apple.com/news/?id=mdkbobfo){:target="_blank"} 🆕
translations.- Support all email fields in Safari and:
- Support all email fields in Safari and Apps

- Users can freely generate virtual email addresses in the settings.
translations.- When not logged in, websites can ident:
- When not logged in, websites can identify the same visitor across different sites using third-party cookies, IP address, and device information combined to create a fingerprint.

- During login, websites can link your data across sites using registration information such as name, birthday, phone number, email, and ID number.

- Apps can identify the same user across different apps by obtaining the Device UUID, use URL Schemes to detect other installed apps on the device, and use the Pasteboard to transfer data between apps. Additionally, user registration data can be linked after login.

- Apps and websites can also use Third-Party Cookies, Fingerprints, and Pasteboards to transfer data.

- The connection between online and offline activities can occur when banks collect credit card transaction records, expense tracking apps, receipt collection apps, dashcam apps, and so on, all of which may link offline activities with online data.
translations.- [graph.facebook.com](https://graph.fac:
- [graph.facebook.com](https://graph.facebook.com/){:target="_blank"} : Facebook-related data statistics

- [app-measurement.com](https://app-measurement.com/){:target="_blank"} : Google-related data analytics: GA/Firebase…
translations.1. Since the report file is a `.ndjson`:
1. Since the report file is a `.ndjson` plain text file and not easy to read directly, you can first download the "[App Privacy Insights](https://apps.apple.com/tw/app/%E9%9A%B1%E7%A7%81%E6%B4%9E%E8%A6%8B-app-privacy-insights/id1575583991){:target="_blank"}" app from the App Store to view the report.

2. Go to Settings -> Privacy -> Scroll to the bottom to "Record App Activity" -> Enable Record App Activity

3. Saving App Activity

4. Select "Import to [Privacy Insights](https://apps.apple.com/tw/app/%E9%9A%B1%E7%A7%81%E6%B4%9E%E8%A6%8B-app-privacy-insights/id1575583991){:target="_blank"}"

5. After importing, you can view the privacy report immediately

It enables getting the current location via user tap without prior consent or prompt. This button is not customizable and can only be triggered by user interaction.*

translations.App 可以用 `URLSessionTaskMetrics` 分析 Priva: Apps can use `URLSessionTaskMetrics` to analyze connection records of Private Relay.
translations.App 與 App 之間可以透過取得 Device UUID 在不同 App 中: Apps can identify the same user across different apps by obtaining the Device UUID, use URL Schemes to detect other installed apps on the device, and use the Pasteboard to transfer data between apps. Additionally, user registration data can be linked after login.
translations.App 與網站之間同樣可以用 Third-Party Cookie、Finger: Apps and websites can also use Third-Party Cookies, Fingerprints, and Pasteboards to transfer data.
translations.Apple 隱私原則及 iOS 歷年對隱私保護的功能調整\n\n: Apple Privacy Principles and iOS Privacy Protection Features Over the Years
translations.Apple/CDN Provider 都沒有完整 Log 可追朔：\n查了下這樣:
Apple/CDN providers do not have complete logs for tracing:  
I checked how Apple prevents misuse in malicious scenarios but found no clear answer; it might be similar to how Apple refuses to unlock criminals' iPhones for the FBI. Privacy is a fundamental human right for everyone.
translations.Data Minimization：只取用你需要的資料\n: Data Minimization: Only Collect the Data You Need
translations.Data Minimization：蘋果用技術手段限制取用需要的資料\n: Data Minimization: Apple uses technical methods to limit access to only the necessary data
translations.On-Device Processing：Apple 基於強大的處理器晶片，如非: On-Device Processing: Apple, based on powerful processor chips, ensures that personal privacy-related data is processed locally whenever possible.
translations.On-Device Processing：隱私資料不上傳雲端，一切都在本地處理；: On-Device Processing: Private data is not uploaded to the cloud; everything is processed locally. Examples include Safari Private Click Measurement, Apple's [machine learning SDK CoreML](../793bf2cdda0f/) which runs locally, Siri/Live Text in Camera on iOS ≥ 15, Apple Maps, News, photo recognition features, and more.
translations.Private Relay 服務會將使用者的原始請求先隨機送到蘋果的 Ingre: The Private Relay service first sends the user's original request randomly to Apple's Ingress Proxy, then Apple randomly assigns it to a partner CDN's Egress Proxy, which finally requests the target website.
translations.Safari 上相對於阻擋 Intelligent Tracking Preve: The feature on Safari corresponding to blocking Intelligent Tracking Prevention is Private Click Measurement ( [WebKit](https://webkit.org/blog/11529/introducing-private-click-measurement-pcm/){:target="_blank"} ), used to measure ad performance without compromising personal privacy.
translations.Safari 會自動移除網址的 Tracking Parameter 參數 (e: Safari automatically removes tracking parameters from URLs (e.g. `fbclid`, `gclid` …)
translations.Security：確保資料儲存、傳遞的安全\n: Security: Ensuring the safety of data storage and transmission
translations.Security：資料儲存傳遞的安全，不濫用 UserDefault、iOS 1: Security: Data storage and transmission security, avoid misuse of UserDefault, iOS 15 allows point-to-point encryption and decryption directly with CryptoKit, transmission security with Private Relay.
translations.User Transparency and Control：新增的各種隱私存取提: User Transparency and Control: New Privacy Access Prompts, Activity Reports, and Granular Privacy Controls
translations.User Transparency and Control：讓使用者了解哪些隱私: User Transparency and Control: Let users know what privacy information is collected and how it is used. Additionally, allow users to control sharing settings for individual privacy data.
translations.XCode 15 能透過 Manifest 產生 Privacy Report: XCode 15 can generate a Privacy Report through the Manifest for developers to set app privacy on the App Store.
translations.[**iOS 14 剪貼簿竊資恐慌，隱私與便利的兩難**](../8a04443: [**iOS 14 Clipboard Data Theft Panic: The Dilemma Between Privacy and Convenience**](../8a04443024e2/)
translations.[*App 必需在 App Store 上說明使用者哪些資料會被追蹤及如何應用*: [*Apps must disclose on the App Store which data will be tracked and how it is used*](https://developer.apple.com/app-store/user-privacy-and-data-use/){:target="*blank"} _.*
translations.[Apple privacy white paper — A Day in th: [Apple privacy white paper — A Day in the Life of Your Data](https://www.apple.com/privacy/docs/A_Day_in_the_Life_of_Your_Data.pdf){:target="_blank"}
translations.[iOS 隱私與便利的前世今生](https://mopcon.org/2021: [iOS Privacy and Convenience: Past and Present](https://mopcon.org/2021/schedule/2021028){:target="_blank"} | [Pinkoi, We Are Hiring!](https://www.pinkoi.com/about/careers){:target="_blank"}
translations.[網路管理者可 Ban 掉 DNS 對所有連接者停用 Private Relay: [Network administrators can ban DNS to disable Private Relay for all users](https://developer.apple.com/support/prepare-your-network-for-icloud-private-relay/){:target="_blank"}
translations.```\n從 2023 年秋季開始，如果你上傳到 App Store Conne:
```
Starting from Fall 2023, if your new app or app update uploaded to App Store Connect uses APIs that require a declared purpose (including those from third-party SDKs), and you have not provided an approved purpose in the app’s privacy manifest, you will receive a notification. From Spring 2024, to upload a new app or app update to App Store Connect, you must specify an approved purpose in the app’s privacy manifest to accurately reflect how your app uses the relevant APIs.

If the current approved purposes do not cover a use case for an API that requires a declared purpose, and you believe this use case directly benefits your app users, please let us know.
```
translations.iOS 14.5 後蘋果加強對 IDFA 的取用限制，App 需要先詢問使用者允: After iOS 14.5, Apple strengthened restrictions on accessing IDFA. Apps must ask users for permission before obtaining the IDFA UUID; without asking or without permission, the value cannot be accessed.
translations.iOS App 可以使用 `canOpenURL` 去探測使用者手機上有沒有裝某: iOS apps can use `canOpenURL` to check if a specific app is installed on the user's device.
translations.iOS ≥ 15 之後優化了剪貼簿提示，如果是使用者自己的貼上動作，就不會再跳提: Starting from iOS 15, the clipboard prompt has been optimized so that if the paste action is performed by the user themselves, the prompt will no longer appear!
translations.iOS ≥ 16 開始非使用者主動操作貼上動作，App 主動讀取剪貼簿的行為會跳: Starting from iOS 16, if an app actively reads the clipboard without the user initiating a paste action, a prompt will appear. The user must tap Allow for the app to access the clipboard content.
translations.iPhone 可針對特定網路連線停用 Private Relay\n: iPhone Can Disable Private Relay for Specific Network Connections
translations.….還有很多很多，會在文章後跟大家分享\n: ...and many more, which will be shared with everyone at the end of the article
translations.一切都是 on-device safari 自行處理、防範惡意點擊也是由 Saf: Everything is handled on-device by Safari itself, and protection against malicious clicks is also provided by Safari.
translations.不影響速度、效能\n: No impact on speed or performance
translations.不清楚官方是否會用工具檢測行為、或是審核人員人工查看\n: It is unclear whether the official process uses tools to detect behavior or if reviewers manually inspect it.
translations.主要還是透過法規約束；很難確保服務 100% 隨時遵守、網路上惡意程式也很多也難: It mainly relies on regulatory constraints; it's hard to ensure services fully comply 100% of the time. There are many malicious programs online, and it's difficult to guarantee that services won't be hacked and cause data leaks. In short, "**if it's malicious, it's technically feasible to do it; relying solely on regulations and corporate conscience is not enough**."
translations.了解到個人隱私洩露的危害及蘋果的隱私原則後，回到技術手段上；我們可以來看看 iO: After understanding the risks of personal privacy leaks and Apple's privacy principles, let's look at the technical measures iOS has implemented over the years to protect personal privacy.
translations.了解完歷年對於隱私功能的調整後，我們回頭來看蘋果的隱私原則：\n\n: After understanding the annual adjustments to privacy features, let's review Apple's privacy principles:
translations.你可能會想說，我瀏覽不同的網站、裝不同的 App (甚至根本沒登入)、再到線下活: You might wonder how a service could possibly link all your data when you browse different websites, install various apps (or even don’t log in at all), and then attend offline events.
translations.使用剪貼簿串接跨平台的資訊，因為蘋果不可能禁用剪貼簿跨 App 使用，但是它可以: Using the clipboard to connect cross-platform information is allowed because Apple cannot disable clipboard use across apps, but it can notify the user.
translations.使用者可到設定中任意產生虛擬信箱\n: Users can generate virtual email addresses freely in the settings.
translations.使用者可要求刪除帳號 [**2022/01/31 前 App 須完成實作**](: Users can request account deletion [**Apps must implement by 2022/01/31**](https://developer.apple.com/news/?id=mdkbobfo){:target="_blank"} 🆕
translations.做法可以在 App 畫面上偷塞一個 1 pixel 的 WebView 元件在背: One method is to secretly embed a 1-pixel WebView element in the app’s background to read Safari cookies.
translations.具體流程如上圖，使用者在 A 網站點擊廣告前往 B 網站時，會在瀏覽器上紀錄一個: The specific process is shown in the above diagram. When a user clicks an ad on website A to go to website B, the browser records a Source ID (identifying the same user) and Destination information (target website). When the user completes a conversion on website B, a Trigger ID (representing the action) is also recorded in the browser.
translations.再追完「 [WWDC 2021 — Apple’s privacy pillar: After watching both "[WWDC 2021 — Apple’s privacy pillars in focus](https://developer.apple.com/videos/play/wwdc2021/10085/){:target="_blank"}" and "[Apple privacy white paper — A Day in the Life of Your Data](https://www.apple.com/privacy/docs/A_Day_in_the_Life_of_Your_Data.pdf){:target="_blank"}," it was like waking up from a dream. We realized that we have unknowingly leaked a lot of personal privacy, allowing advertisers and social media to profit immensely. This has become pervasive in our daily lives.
translations.到設定 -> 隱私權 -> 最下方「紀錄 App 活動」-> 啟用紀錄 App: Go to Settings -> Privacy -> Scroll to the bottom to "Record App Activity" -> Enable Record App Activity
translations.包含 Firebase Dynamic Links、Branch.io 最新版(: Both Firebase Dynamic Links and the latest version of Branch.io (previously using IP Address Fingerprint) now use the clipboard for Deferred Deep Link.
translations.匯入完成後即可檢視隱私報告\n: After importing, you can view the privacy report immediately
translations.參考 [Apple privacy white paper](https://w: Referring to the [Apple privacy white paper](https://www.apple.com/privacy/docs/A_Day_in_the_Life_of_Your_Data.pdf){:target="_blank"}, the following uses a fictional character, Harry, to illustrate how privacy can be leaked and the potential risks involved.
translations.另外 Apple 還有提到關於未成年人的個人隱私，多半也都在監護人未同意的情況下: Apple also mentioned that personal privacy of minors is mostly collected by services without the consent of their guardians.
translations.可以使用 [SKAdNetwork](https://developer.app: You can use [SKAdNetwork](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/storekit/skadnetwork){:target="_blank"} (requires Apple approval to join), similar to Private Click Measurement, no further explanation provided.
translations.可以看到同 [新聞](https://technews.tw/2021/10/1: As mentioned in the [news](https://technews.tw/2021/10/12/china-app-reads-iphone-user-album-data/){:target="_blank"}, Wechat does secretly read photo information in the background when the app is relaunched.
translations.可從 XCode Netowrk 工具中檢查 Tracking Domain 是: You can check if the Tracking Domain is blocked using the XCode Network tool:
translations.可隱藏真實 Email (使用蘋果產的虛擬 Email 代替)\n: Can hide real Email (use Apple-generated virtual Email as a substitute)
translations.同 Sign in with Apple 使用蘋果產的虛擬 Email 代替真實: Like Sign in with Apple, Apple-generated virtual emails replace your real email address. When a message is received, Apple forwards it to your real inbox, protecting your email information.
translations.同前文所說的蘋果隱私原則，希望的是平衡而不是完全阻斷使用者與服務。\n\n: As mentioned in the previous text about Apple's privacy principles, the goal is balance, not completely blocking users from services.
translations.同前述， iOS ≥ 15 已被 Private Relay 混淆。\n\n: As mentioned earlier, iOS ≥ 15 is already obfuscated by Private Relay.
translations.回到最一開始用技術手段拼湊出哈里的關聯圖，網站與網站或 App 之間被堵死，只剩: Returning to the initial technical method of piecing together Harry's connection graph, websites and apps are blocked from linking, leaving only clipboard use available, but with prompts.
translations.因此「以人為本」是我會給蘋果的理念的代名詞，要與商業市場唱反調需要很大的信念；與: Therefore, "people-centered" is the philosophy I associate with Apple. It takes strong conviction to go against the commercial market. Related to this, "technology-centered" is the term I associate with Google, as Google always creates many geeky tech projects. Lastly, "business-centered" is what I associate with Facebook, because FB pursues commercial gains on many levels.
translations.因此請注意 FB/Google 數據統計在 iOS 17 後可能會大幅流失，因為: Please note that FB/Google data statistics may significantly drop after iOS 17 because without permission requests and tracking consent, no data will be received; based on past implementations of tracking permission requests, about 70% of users choose not to allow tracking.
translations.因紀錄報告檔案是 `.ndjson` 純文字檔，直接查看不易；可以先在 App: Since the report file is a `.ndjson` plain text file and not easy to read directly, you can first download the "[App Privacy Insights](https://apps.apple.com/tw/app/%E9%9A%B1%E7%A7%81%E6%B4%9E%E8%A6%8B-app-privacy-insights/id1575583991){:target="_blank"}" app from the App Store to view the report.
translations.圖三 啟用 Private Relay — 使用國家和時區（擴大模糊）：IP變成: Figure 3 Enabling Private Relay — Usage by Country and Time Zone (Expanded Obfuscation): IP changes to CDN IP & location changes to Taichung, but remains in the same time zone and country
translations.圖二 啟用 Private Relay — 保持一般位置：IP變成 CDN IP: Figure 2 Enable Private Relay — Maintain General Location: IP becomes CDN IP but still in Taipei
translations.在它眼中的哈里，可能比哈里還更了解自己；這些資料用在社交媒體，可以讓使用者更加沈: In its eyes, Harry might understand himself better than Harry does; this data, when used on social media, can make users more addicted; when used in advertising, it can push Harry into overconsumption or create a cage effect (e.g., recommending you buy new pants, then after buying pants you buy matching shoes, then after shoes you buy socks... endless).
translations.在沒有實現 Deferred Deep Link 延遲深度連結之前，當我們引導使: Before implementing Deferred Deep Link, when guiding users to install an app from a website, opening the app after installation would default to the homepage; a better user experience should open the app to the corresponding page related to where the user left off on the website.
translations.如上圖所示：\n\n: As shown in the image above:
translations.如果 Tracking Domain 跟 API Domain 相同則需分開一個: If the Tracking Domain is the same as the API Domain, a separate independent Tracking Domain is required (e.g. api.zhgchg.li -> tracking.zhgchg.li)
translations.如果不清楚 Apple 的隱私原則，甚至會覺得為何 Apple 這幾年不斷地在跟: If you are not familiar with Apple’s privacy principles, you might wonder why Apple has been constantly clashing with developers and advertisers in recent years. Many features that users are accustomed to have been blocked.
translations.如果想知道最嚴格情況下的效果可安裝 [iOS DuckDuckGo](https: If you want to see the effect under the strictest conditions, you can install the [iOS DuckDuckGo](https://apps.apple.com/tw/app/duckduckgo-private-browser/id663592361){:target="_blank"} browser for testing.
translations.如果有需要取得 Safari 的 Cookie (EX: 直接使用網站 Cook: If you need to access Safari's cookies (e.g., using website cookies for login), you can use the `SFSafariViewController` component; however, this component forces a prompt window and cannot be customized, ensuring users are not unknowingly having their cookies stolen.
translations.實作可參考我之前的文章： [iOS Deferred Deep Link 延遲深: For implementation, you can refer to my previous article: [iOS Deferred Deep Link 延遲深度連結實作(Swift)](../b08ef940c196/)
translations.對於之前演講的最新 iOS 17 隱私相關調整補充。\n\n: Supplement on the latest iOS 17 privacy-related adjustments from the previous presentation.
translations.尤其在 Third-Party Cookie 被禁之後，有越來越多服務採用這個方: Especially after Third-Party Cookies were banned, more and more services have adopted this method, and Apple is aware... Fortunately, iOS 15 even obfuscates your IP information!
translations.左邊是個人資料，可能來自網站註冊資料、外送資料；右邊是依照哈里的活動紀錄打上的行: The left side shows personal data, which may come from website registration or delivery information; the right side displays behavior and interest tags based on Harry’s activity records.
translations.市調公司初步調查數據大約有 7成的使用者(最新數據有人說 9 成)都不允許追蹤取: Market research firms' preliminary data show that about 70% of users (some recent data say 90%) do not allow tracking using IDFA, which is why people say IDFA is dead!
translations.從應用角度來看，同一個地區的所有裝置都會使用同個共享的 CDN 的 Egress: From an application perspective, all devices in the same region use the same shared CDN Egress Proxy IP to request the target website; therefore, the website can no longer use IP as fingerprint information.
translations.扯遠了，因此用 IP 位址得到 Fingerprint 去辨識使用者的方法，也無: Going off-topic, therefore the method of using IP addresses to obtain fingerprints for user identification can no longer be used.
translations.技術細節可參考「 [WWDC 2021 — Get ready for iClo: Technical details can be found in "[WWDC 2021 — Get ready for iCloud Private Relay](https://developer.apple.com/videos/play/wwdc2021/10096/){:target="_blank"}".
translations.技術細節可參考「 [WWDC 2021 — Meet privacy-prese: Technical details can be found in "[WWDC 2021 — Meet privacy-preserving ad attribution](https://developer.apple.com/videos/play/wwdc2021/10033/){:target="_blank"}".
translations.支援 Safari、App 所有信箱欄位\n: Support all email fields in Safari and Apps
translations.整個流程都經過加密只有自己 iPhone 的晶片解的開，也只有自己同時知道 IP: The entire process is encrypted and can only be decrypted by your iPhone's chip. Only you know both the IP and the target website of the request. Apple's Ingress Proxy only knows your IP, the CDN's Egress Proxy only knows the IP of Apple's Ingress Proxy and the target website, and the website only knows the IP of the CDN's Egress Proxy.
translations.早期 iOS Safari 的 Cookie 跟 App WebView 的 C: In early iOS versions, Safari cookies and App WebView cookies could be shared, allowing data to be linked between websites and apps.
translations.更好的做法是先用 `UIPasteboard.general.detectPat: A better approach is to first use `UIPasteboard.general.detectPatterns` to detect if the clipboard data is what we need before reading it.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有你的個人資料又知道你的經濟狀況…要做惡的話不敢想像，例如：綁架、竊盜…\n\n: Having your personal information along with knowledge of your financial status… the potential harm is unimaginable, such as kidnapping or theft…
translations.服務註冊跟第三方登入的個資，可以改用 Sign in with apple 和: Personal data for service registration and third-party login can be protected by using Sign in with Apple and Hide My Email features; alternatively, use more native iOS apps.
translations.未登入時網站與網站之間可以透過 Third-Party Cookie、IP Ad: When not logged in, websites can identify the same visitor across different sites using third-party cookies, IP address, and device information combined to create a fingerprint.
translations.法律規範 (EX: SGS-BS10012 個資驗證、CCPA、GDPR…)\n: Legal Regulations (e.g., SGS-BS10012 Personal Data Verification, CCPA, GDPR…)
translations.為避免部分有機會得出 fingerprinting 的 Foundation A: To prevent potential misuse of Foundation APIs that could lead to fingerprinting, Apple has started to regulate certain Foundation APIs; [developers need to declare the reason for usage in the Manifest](https://developer.apple.com/cn/news/?id=z6fu1dcu){:target="_blank"}.
translations.登入時網站與網站之間可以透過註冊資料，如姓名、生日、電話、Email、身分證字號: During login, websites can link your data across sites using registration information such as name, birthday, phone number, email, and ID number.
translations.發送 Tracking 資訊的 API Domain 需宣告在 privacy: The API domains sending tracking information must be declared in the privacy manifest .xprivacy and can only initiate network requests after the user consents to tracking; otherwise, all network requests to these domains will be blocked by the system.
translations.目前實測 Facebook、Google 的 Tracking Domain 都: Currently, Facebook and Google's tracking domains are detected and must be listed as Tracking Domains with user permission requested accordingly.
translations.目前暫時無法知道蘋果如何控管開發者自己的 Tracking，用 XCode 15: Currently, it is not possible to know how Apple controls developers' own tracking. Testing with XCode 15 on our own app did not detect any tracking.
translations.目前比較有影響的是 UserDefault 即屬於要宣告的 API。\n\n: Currently, the more impactful API is UserDefault, which requires declaration.
translations.目前測試 iOS 17 Developer Beta 4， `fbxxx` 、: Currently testing iOS 17 Developer Beta 4, `fbxxx`, `gcxxx`, etc. are removed, while `utm_` parameters are retained; it is unclear if the official iOS 17 or future iOS 18 will strengthen this further.
translations.目前還在 Beta 版 (2021/10/24)，啟用後部分服務可能會連不上 (: Currently still in Beta (2021/10/24). After activation, some services may not connect (China region, Chinese version of TikTok) or services may frequently log out.
translations.知道個人隱私洩露帶來的危害之後，來看一下蘋果的隱私原則。\n\n: After understanding the risks of personal privacy leaks, let's take a look at Apple's privacy principles.
translations.節錄自 Apple Privacy White Paper 蘋果的理想不是完全封: Excerpt from Apple Privacy White Paper: Apple's ideal is not total blocking but balance. For example, many people have installed AD Blockers in recent years to completely block ads, which is not what Apple wants; because completely cutting off makes it difficult to provide better services.
translations.線上與線下活動的串連可能發生在，銀行端蒐集信用卡消費記錄、記帳 App、發票蒐集: The connection between online and offline activities can occur when banks collect credit card transaction records, expense tracking apps, receipt collection apps, dashcam apps, and so on, all of which may link offline activities with online data.
translations.線下活動或許可以改 Apple Card 防止隱私外洩？\n\n: Could offline events possibly modify Apple Card to prevent privacy leaks?
translations.線下活動會留下記錄的地方例如：發票、信用卡刷卡紀錄、行車記錄器…等等\n\n: Offline activities leave records in places such as: receipts, credit card transaction records, dashcam footage, and so on.
translations.要實現這個功能就需要 網站與 App 之間有機會串起資料，如文章前述的其他方法都: To achieve this function, data exchange between the website and the app is necessary. As other methods mentioned earlier have been blocked, currently the clipboard is the only available medium for storing information (as shown above).
translations.設定 -> Apple ID -> 隱藏我的電子郵件\n\n: Settings -> Apple ID -> Hide My Email
translations.詳細測試細節請參考「 [iOS17 Safari 的新功能會把網址裡的 fbcl: For detailed testing information, please refer to the excellent article "[iOS17 Safari's New Feature Removes fbclid and gclid from URLs](https://blog.user.today/ios17-safari-remove-fbclid-and-gclid/){:target="_blank"}".
translations.詳細說明可參考：「 [App privacy details on the Ap: For detailed information, please refer to: "[App privacy details on the App Store](https://developer.apple.com/app-store/app-privacy-details/){:target="_blank"}".
translations.諸如家大業大的 Facebook、Google 都靠個人廣告獲得不少收益；許多網: Big companies like Facebook and Google earn a lot from personalized ads; many websites and apps also integrate Facebook and Google SDKs… so it’s hard to tell everything. While some are visible, often we don’t know which third-party ad or data collection services websites and apps use to secretly track our every move.
translations.賈伯斯在 2010 年的 [All Things Digital Confere: Steve Jobs said at the 2010 [All Things Digital Conference](https://money.cnn.com/2018/03/27/technology/steve-jobs-mark-zuckerberg-privacy-2010/index.html){:target="_blank"}:
translations.透過 Third-Party Cookie 跨網站追蹤使用者這條路，在 Safa: Tracking users across websites via Third-Party Cookies is basically no longer feasible on Safari.
translations.這兩個資訊會合併起來在隨機 24 ~ 48 小時後傳送到 A 和 B 網站得到廣: These two pieces of information will be combined and sent to websites A and B after a random 24 to 48 hours to obtain ad performance results.
translations.這次很榮幸能參加 [MOPCON 演講](https://mopcon.org/: I am honored to participate in the [MOPCON Talk](https://mopcon.org/2021/schedule/2021028){:target="_blank"}, but due to the pandemic, it was held online, which is a pity as I couldn't meet more new friends. The topic of this talk is "The Past and Present of iOS Privacy and Convenience," where I mainly want to share Apple's privacy principles and the feature adjustments iOS has made over the years based on these principles.
translations.連接 VPN/ 掛 Proxy 時會停用 Private Relay\n: Connecting to VPN/Proxy will disable Private Relay
translations.開發者自己的打 API 送 Tracking 方式，蘋果也說需要同上列管 Tra: Developers' own API calls for sending tracking data must also comply with the tracking domain regulations mentioned above.
translations.開發者需把使用到的 User Privacy 宣告在內， **並也需要要求有使用: Developers must declare the User Privacy aspects they use, **and also require the SDKs they use to provide the SDK's Privacy Manifest.**
translations.除了針對隱私功能的調整，這幾年的 iOS 也不斷加強防止手機沈迷的功能，推出了「: Besides adjustments to privacy features, iOS has also continuously enhanced tools to prevent phone addiction in recent years, introducing features like "Screen Time Report," "App Usage Limits," and "Focus Mode" to help users break free from phone addiction.
translations.除此之外更多時候，我們是「被迫」接受隱私權條款的，無法針對個別隱私授權，要馬整個: Besides, most of the time, we are "forced" to accept privacy policies. We cannot selectively authorize privacy permissions; either we don’t use the entire service or we accept all privacy terms to use it. Privacy policies are often not transparent, leaving us unaware of how our data is collected and used, and whether a third party is secretly gathering our information without our knowledge.
translations.預設啟用，瀏覽器會主動辨識用於追蹤、廣告的第三方 Cookie 加以阻擋；並且在: Enabled by default, the browser actively identifies and blocks third-party cookies used for tracking and advertising; each year, the iOS version continuously improves the detection algorithm to prevent misses.
translations.預設開啟，不需特別連接\n: Enabled by default, no special connection needed
translations.類似 10 分鐘信箱，但又更強大；只要不停用，那組虛擬信箱地址就是你永久持有；也: Similar to a 10-minute email but more powerful; as long as you keep using it, that virtual email address is yours permanently. There is no limit on adding new addresses—you can create unlimited ones. It's unclear how Apple prevents abuse.
translations.首先是哈里 iPhone 上的使用紀錄。\n\n: First is Harry's usage record on the iPhone.
